code: import axios from'axios';import AsyncStorage from'@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';const API_BASE='https://mazi-ordering-production.up.railway.app/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE,timeout:15000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});api.interceptors.request.use(async config=>{const token=await AsyncStorage.getItem('mazi_token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});export async function loginStaff(id,pin){const res=await api.post('/auth/waiter',{app_id:id,pin});if(res.data.token){await AsyncStorage.setItem('mazi_token',res.data.token);}return res.data;}export async function getAuthStatus(){const res=await api.get('/auth/status');return res.data;}export async function sendPhoneCode(phone){const res=await api.post('/phone/send-code',{phone});return res.data;}export async function verifyPhoneCode(phone,code){const res=await api.post('/phone/verify-code',{phone,code});return res.data;}export async function isPhoneVerified(phone){const res=await api.get(`/phone/verified/${encodeURIComponent(phone)}`);return res.data;}export async function generateQRCode(tableId,reservationName,branchId){const res=await api.post('/qrcode/generate',{table_id:tableId,reservation_name:reservationName,branch_id:branchId});return res.data;}export async function decodeQRPayload(payload){const res=await api.post('/qrcode/decode',{payload});return res.data;}export async function getMenu(){const res=await api.get('/menu');return{products:res.data.products,categories:res.data.categories};}export async function getProducts(){const res=await api.get('/menu/products');return res.data.products;}export async function getCategories(){const res=await api.get('/menu/categories');return res.data.categories;}export async function getTables(){const res=await api.get('/tables');return res.data.tables;}export async function getTable(id){const res=await api.get(`/tables/${id}`);return res.data.table;}export async function createOrder(data){const res=await api.post('/orders',data);return res.data.order;}export async function getOrder(id){const res=await api.get(`/orders/${id}`);return res.data.order;}export async function listOrders(branchId){const res=await api.get('/orders',{params:{branch_id:branchId}});return res.data.orders;}export async function addProductsToOrder(orderId,products){const res=await api.post(`/orders/${orderId}/products`,{products});return res.data.order;}export async function getWebhookEvents(){const res=await api.get('/webhooks/events');return res.data.events;}export{api};
